commands_run: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/form-freq-check.fk form-stdlib/oracle-distillation-learning.fk form-stdlib/tests/oracle-distillation-learning-band.fk
failure_reason: Added the native oracle-distillation learning floor for summary, NL-to-Form, freq-check, STT, and TTS lanes. The floor turns oracle/native comparisons into Form training rows and reduces oracle reliance only when native candidates pass receipt floors with lower cost.
